name: hbcf-social-media
description: Draft Facebook and Instagram posts, generate branded graphics, process photos, and prepare Publer CSV bulk uploads for the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival. Covers the full visual template library, photo treatment workflow (HEIC, square crop, hedgehog watermark), parsing of teammate Word-doc drafts, image-vs-video posting strategy, and the .import end-to-end command (base message plus images to branded posts, CSVs, and a push for Publer). Triggers on HBCF post requests, sponsor thanks, countdown posts, photo watermarking, event-day carousels, import, and Publer CSV preparation.
